segments.text: A message from the Lord came to me, saying,
Son of man, you are to prophesy against the prophets of Israel who right now are busy prophesying. Tell those who make up their own prophecies: Listen to the word of the Lord!
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: This is what the Lord God says: Disaster is coming to these foolish prophets who follow their own ideas. They haven't seen anything.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Israel, your prophets are like foxes that live in the ruins.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They didn't go and help repair the gaps in the wall that defends the people of Israel so that it would st and secure during the battle on the Day of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The visions they see are false, and the prophecies they give are lies. They claim, ‘This is what the Lord says,’ when the Lord didn't send them. Even so they still expect their message to be fulfilled!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Isn't it a false vision that you people saw? Isn't it a prophecy of lies when you announce, ‘This is what the Lord says,’ even though I haven't said anything?
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: So this is what the Lord God says: Since you've spoken lies and claimed to see false visions, then watch out, because I'm against you, declares the Lord God.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will punish the prophets who see false visions and give prophecies that are lies. They will not belong to the assembly of my people or be listed in the register of Israelites, and they won't be allowed to enter the country of Israel. Then you will know that I am the Lord God.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: They have deceived my people by saying, ‘We shall have peace,’ when there won't be any peace. It's like they're putting a coat of whitewash on an unstable wall of loose stones that the people have built.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So tell those people whitewashing the wall that it's going to collapse. Rain will come pouring down. I will send hailstones crashing down on it. A windstorm will blow hard against it.
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: Don't you think that when the wall collapses people are going to ask you, ‘What happened to the whitewash you painted it with?’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So this is what the Lord God says: In my furious anger I'm going to send a windstorm, pouring rain, and hailstones to destroy the wall.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will demolish the wall you whitewashed, knocking it to the ground to reveal its foundations. The city is going to fall, and you're going to be destroyed with it. Then you will know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Once the wall and those who whitewashed it have experienced my anger, I will tell you: The wall is no more, and those who whitewashed it are no more,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: those ‘prophets’ of Israel who prophesied to Jerusalem and claimed to have seen a vision of peace for her when there wasn't going to be any peace, declares the Lord God.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Now, son of man, you are to oppose those Israelite women who make up prophecies in their own minds. Prophesy against them
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: and tell them that this is what the Lord God says: Disaster is coming to the women who sew bracelets of magic charms for their wrists and make veils for all kinds of people to wear as ways to trap and exploit them. Do you think you can trap the lives of my people yet still keep your own?
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: You have disgraced me among my people for a few handfuls of barley and scraps of bread. By lying to my people who believe in you, you have killed those who shouldn't have died and let others live who shouldn't.
segments.speaker: Ezekiel

segments.text: So this is what the Lord God says: Watch out! I condemn the magic charms you use to trap people like birds, and I will rip them off your arms. I will set free those you have trapped.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: I will also rip off your veils and rescue my people from your power, so that they will no longer be your victims. Then you will know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: Because you have discouraged good people with your lies, even though I didn't have anything against them, and because you have encouraged the wicked that they shouldn't give up from their evil ways to save their lives,
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: from now on you won't claim these false visions or practice magic. I will rescue my people from your power. Then you will know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD
